raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_intent","object_kind":"action","confidence":0.76,"matched_text":"I'll ask the tourism board about upcoming craft fairs and artisan markets, and also ask if they know of any resources that might be helpful for artisans like me.","distilled_fact":"The speaker will ask the tourism board about upcoming craft fairs and artisan markets."},{"signal_kind":"potential_intent","object_kind":"action","confidence":0.74,"matched_text":"I'll ask the tourism board about upcoming craft fairs and artisan markets, and also ask if they know of any resources that might be helpful for artisans like me.","distilled_fact":"The speaker will ask the tourism board about resources that might be helpful for artisans like the speaker."},{"signal_kind":"potential_question","object_kind":"question","confidence":0.7,"matched_text":"Do you think they would also know about any local classes or workshops that might help me improve my craft-making skills?","distilled_fact":"The speaker is asking whether the tourism board would know about any local classes or workshops that might help the speaker improve the speaker's craft-making skills."}]}
